prompt: I just installed railway-cli. I have two Railway accounts - one personal and one for my client project. Help me set this up so I can use both without having to log in and out via the browser each time.

assertions.text: Recommends token-based auth instead of browser login
Guides creating a config file with multi-account structure
Shows how to add both accounts with distinct names/tokens
Includes token verification step (railway whoami or similar)
Shows how to map project directories to specific accounts
